description_long: This is a traditional wooden windmill with a rectangular, multi-story structure and a pitched roof. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden planks, and the windmill features four large, lattice-style blades attached to a central hub on one side. The base is elevated on a wooden platform with visible support beams, and a ladder provides access to the main entrance. The windmill has open window frames on the upper levels, suggesting interior floors and possible storage or milling areas. The overall appearance is rustic, with natural wood tones and a robust, functional design typical of historical European windmills.
description: A multi-story wooden windmill with four large lattice blades, a pitched roof, and an elevated base accessed by a ladder.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full length of the four windmill blades and the curved roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden plank walls, open windows, and the depth of the structure.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the windmill's blades in full extension and the main entrance area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden structure, open windows, and the rear support platform.
